title: 🧩 Shopify Product Scraper - Apps Spy + Reviews

store_urls.title: Shopify Store URLs
store_urls.description: List of Shopify store URLs to scrape (e.g. https://allbirds.com). Works with any custom domain or *.myshopify.com URL.

extract_level.title: Extraction Level
extract_level.description:
Choose what to extract:
- Basic: products only
- Standard: products + installed apps detection
- Full: + reviews from Yotpo / Judge.me / Loox / Stamped
- Pro: + estimated revenue (advanced)

max_products_per_store.title: Max Products Per Store
max_products_per_store.description: Cap the number of products extracted per store. Set to 0 for unlimited.

products_collection_filter.title: Filter by Collection (optional)
products_collection_filter.description: Only extract products from a specific collection handle (e.g. 'sneakers', 'new-arrivals'). Leave empty for full catalog.

include_variants.title: Include Product Variants
include_variants.description: Output one record per variant (size/color/SKU) instead of one per product.

max_reviews_per_product.title: Max Reviews Per Product (Full/Pro level only)
max_reviews_per_product.description: How many reviews to extract per product when extract_level=full or pro.

max_concurrent_stores.title: Concurrent Stores (multi-store mode)
max_concurrent_stores.description: Number of stores scraped in parallel. Higher = faster but more memory.

max_concurrent_requests.title: Concurrent Requests Per Store
max_concurrent_requests.description: How many parallel HTTP calls per store. Increase for faster runs, decrease if you hit rate-limits.

use_residential_proxy.title: Use Residential Proxy (advanced)
use_residential_proxy.description: Default OFF - datacenter proxy is sufficient for /products.json. Enable only if you scrape >500 stores and hit rate-limits.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify proxy configuration. Default: datacenter auto (no group). Override here or use the 'use_residential_proxy' switch above.

debug_mode.title: Debug Mode
debug_mode.description: Enable verbose logging and save raw HTML snapshots to KV store on errors.
